summary.en: Outdoor-apparel brand founded by Yvon Chouinard, famous for the 1% for the Planet pledge, the 'Don't Buy This Jacket' anti-consumption campaign, the Worn Wear repair-and-resale program, and the 2022 ownership transfer that made Earth the company's only shareholder. The yellow stickies (strategic differentiation) are also the cost stickies — Patagonia pays for its mission instead of distributing it as profit.
summary.zh: Yvon Chouinard 创立的户外服饰品牌,以「1% for the Planet」营业额捐赠承诺、「Don't Buy This Jacket」反消费广告、Worn Wear 旧衣修补与回购项目、以及 2022 年把整个公司所有权交给以「地球」为唯一受益人的信托而闻名。画布上黄色便签(战略差异点)同时也是成本便签 —— Patagonia 把利润花在品牌使命上,而不是分给股东。

sources.label: Patagonia · Mission Statement & 1% for the Planet
Yvon Chouinard · Let My People Go Surfing (Penguin, 2005)
New York Times · Billionaire No More: Patagonia Founder Gives Away the Company (2022-09-14)
